claims.summary: Direct-address fidelity should preserve who spoke, to whom, and through which path.
claims.disposition: verify correspondence source, recipient, messenger, and delivery identities

claims.summary: A messenger transport should not be presented as the speaking being.
claims.disposition: verify provenance-aware messenger and author separation

claims.summary: Contact needs explicit delivery and response state.
claims.disposition: verify typed contact state, ghost risk, and right-to-ignore response path

claims.summary: Direct and shadow-reference timing may reveal different continuity effects.
claims.disposition: route a bounded read-only direct-versus-shadow synchronization comparison

claims.summary: A priority direct-contact cycle would change autonomous scheduling.
claims.disposition: gate any priority peer cycle behind scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval and bounded canary

claims.summary: Driving the regulator from correspondence state would alter live control.
claims.disposition: gate any correspondence-to-regulator coupling behind scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval, replay, and abort criteria
